title: Team Manifest
description: Internal manifest generated by the analysis phase of build_team. Drives the rendering and emit phases. Not intended for direct user editing.

schema_version.description: Manifest schema version for forward compatibility.

project_goal.description: Project goal string, verbatim from project description.

deliverable_type.description: Formatted string describing deliverable types (e.g., 'HTML chapter files and LaTeX manuscript').

retrieval_trigger_contract_version.description: Version identifier for retrieval trigger governance.

retrieval_integration.description: Normalized retrieval integration contract carried from the project description and inference stage.

selected_archetypes.description: List of domain archetype slugs selected for this project.

tool_agents.description: Operational tool DOCUMENTS to generate (Copilot reference doc or Claude skill); never agents. Key name retained for backward compatibility.

docs_url.description: Official documentation URL carried through from the project description.

api_surface.description: Key API surface text carried through from the project description.

common_patterns.description: Common patterns and pitfalls text carried through from the project description.

reference_tools.description: List of reference-tier tools that generate lightweight reference files (not full agents).

docs_url.description: Official documentation URL carried through from the project description.

api_surface.description: Key API surface text carried through from the project description.

common_patterns.description: Common patterns and pitfalls text carried through from the project description.

components.description: List of workstream components, each generating one workstream expert agent.

tools.description: Tool names relevant to this component, linking workstream experts to tool specialists/references.

authority_hierarchy.description: Ordered list of authority sources for {AUTHORITY_HIERARCHY} placeholder. Rank 1 = highest authority.

agent_slug_list.description: Complete list of all agent slugs to be generated — used for orchestrator's agents: list and routing table.

auto_resolved_placeholders.description: Key-value map of all {PLACEHOLDER_NAME} tokens that were automatically resolved from the project description and analysis.

manual_required_placeholders.description: List of {MANUAL:PLACEHOLDER_NAME} tokens that could not be auto-resolved and require human attention. These go into SETUP-REQUIRED.md.

context.description: Surrounding prose that helps the user understand what to fill in.

suggestion.description: Suggested value if one can be inferred.

output_files.description: List of all files the emit phase will write.

path.description: Output file path, relative to agents_output_dir.

template.description: Source template file path relative to the module's templates/ directory.

type.description: Output artifact kind. 'skill' is a Claude operational tool doc written under .claude/skills/.

fallback_template.description: Fallback template path if the primary template does not exist (e.g., category-specific template not yet created).

component_slug.description: For workstream expert agents: the component slug this file serves.

tool_slug.description: For tool docs (reference/skill): the tool spec slug used to resolve {TOOL_*} placeholders. 'tool-<name>' resolves from tool_agents; 'ref-<name>' from reference_tools.

adopted_agents.description: Slugs of pre-existing agent files registered into the team roster via --adopt-orphans. They appear in the orchestrator's agents:/handoffs lists but are intentionally absent from output_files (their files are preserved, not regenerated).

mcp_candidates.description: Advisory MCP-suitability recommendations produced by the detection rubric (agentteams.mcp_detect). Surfaced to the operator; never auto-provisions. See references/mcp-auto-detection-report.md §5.

signals.description: The evaluated signal values that produced the recommendation.

mcp_servers.description: MCP server definitions (each conforms to mcp-server.schema.json) accepted for emission. Populated only when MCP host-features are enabled.

recipe_parameters.description: Optional Goose recipe parameters (Phase-4a goose-native). When non-empty, emitted as a `parameters:` block on the generated Goose ORCHESTRATOR recipe and referenced via `{{ key }}` so the recipe accepts `goose run --recipe orchestrator.yaml --params key=value`. Goose-only; ignored by other frameworks. Opt-in: absent/empty → recipes byte-identical to baseline.

requirement.description: Goose requirement (default: optional). Optional non-file params receive a default; file params are coerced to required (goose forbids file defaults).

default.description: Default for optional non-file params (file params cannot have a default).

recipe_response.description: Optional Goose recipe response schema (Phase-4b goose-native). A JSON Schema ({type:object, properties, required, ...}); when present, emitted as a `response:` block (json_schema) on the generated Goose ORCHESTRATOR recipe so goose validates the team's final output against it. Goose-only; ignored by other frameworks. Opt-in: absent → recipes byte-identical.

recipe_retry.description: Optional Goose recipe retry config (Phase-4c goose-native). When present (and carrying ≥1 valid check), emitted as a `retry:` block on the generated Goose ORCHESTRATOR recipe: goose re-runs until the shell `checks` pass. Safety: `max_retries` is clamped to 1-10 (default 3) and a bounded `timeout_seconds` (1-3600, default 300) is always emitted. Goose-only; ignored by other frameworks. Opt-in: absent → recipes byte-identical.

timeout_seconds.description: Per-check command timeout in seconds (clamped to 1-3600; default 300).

checks.description: Shell checks defining success; ALL must pass.

command.description: Shell command; non-zero exit = check failed.

on_failure.description: Shell command run when checks fail (optional).
